summary: Generates procedural noise as CHOP channels over time. Useful for organic motion, parameter randomization, and audio-like signals.

key_params.name: type
key_params.note: Noise type: Sparse, Hermite, Harmonic, Random

key_params.name: period
key_params.note: Time period of the noise in seconds — lower is faster

key_params.name: seed
key_params.note: Random seed — different seeds produce different patterns

common_gotchas: Noise is time-based by default; if the timeline is paused, the output will freeze unless you use an independent time source.
